title: Email Address Validator | Free Online Tool
description: Validate email address format, syntax, and extract domain information. Bulk validate multiple emails instantly. Free, secure, and works offline.

schemas.name: Email Address Validator
schemas.description: Validate email address format, syntax, and extract domain information. Bulk validate multiple emails instantly.

mainEntity.name: How do I validate an email address format?

acceptedAnswer.text: Enter the email address in our validator above. It checks RFC 5322 syntax (proper local-part@domain format), verifies the domain has valid MX records, and flags common typos. For programmatic validation, use a regex pattern or a library like email-validator in Python.

mainEntity.name: What does email domain validation check?

acceptedAnswer.text: Domain validation queries DNS MX records to confirm the domain is configured to receive email. An address like user@example.com might have valid syntax but fail domain validation if example.com has no mail server configured.

mainEntity.name: Can this tool check if an email address actually exists?

acceptedAnswer.text: Our tool validates syntax and domain (MX records). It cannot verify whether a specific mailbox exists without sending an email, as most mail servers no longer support VRFY commands for privacy reasons.
